#  Change Orders 
Table of Contents 
##  Diagrams 
###  Change Order Tiers 
The steps that you use to create a change order depend on the change order tier setting configured on the Procore project tool used to create the original contract.
###  Prime Contract Change Order Tiers 
![Diagram Change Orders - Prime Contract Change Orders](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4q923YCTlS8Gpm69iCkL8w/0a3f6fc2ebc936c5fad4b64e8cb5b2ef/Change_Orders_-_Prime_Contract_Change_Orders.png?fm=webp)
###  Commitment Change Order Tiers 
![Diagram Change Orders - Commitment Change Orders](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/31XuUL10nsr6HGVxR4kvCn/8b9a86e6445e84e1dbf81a650b498f00/Change_Orders_-_Commitment_Change_Orders.png?fm=webp)
title: Diagrams
description: This page includes the standard workflow diagrams for actions in or related to the project's Change Orders tool.
